metadata.thoughts:
**Processing strike extraction data**

I need to output JSON in the specified strike_extraction format. The document announces an upcoming national strike for January 10, 2025, from 19:32 to 23:32. Therefore, I can set isStrike to true. The startDate will be "2025-01-10 19:32:00" and endDate will be "2025-01-10 23:32:00". The locationType is "NATIONAL," so locationCodes must be null. The description reinforces that it should be explicitly null.
